summary: PASS round 4 (delta-r2): Both bounce findings CLOSED with live proof. QA-08: set_config('app.current_user_id', $1, true) replaces the invalid parameterized SET LOCAL — replay now returns 401 SESSION_REVOKED + family-wipe DB-confirmed. Live-PG test (family-wipe.live.test.ts 3/3 PASS, no skips) is non-inert: removing set_config → brain_app RLS sees 0 rows (assertion fails). SEC-AOF-N1: BFF rate-limit single-counts — trips at attempt 6 after 5 failures (not at attempt 3 as with double-count); Redis counter=6 at first 429. Full suite green: 34/34 typecheck, 74/74 unit (incl. 3 live-PG), 18/18 lint, 3/3 Playwright. No prior-green-now-red regressions. All 9 bounce findings from rounds 1-4 closed.
